'''√th-w-sh''' ('''kathawash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:magpie|magpie]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-w-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:magpie|magpie]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √th-w-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kathawash
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thithawash || jithawash || shithawash || kithawash
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuthawash || jujuthawash || shushuthawash || kukuthawash
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuthawash || juthawash || shuthawash || kuthawash
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuthawash || juthawash || shuthawash || kuthawash
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thethawash || jethawash || shethawash || kethawash
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothothawash || jojothawash || shoshothawash || kokothawash
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thothawash || jothawash || shothawash || kothawash
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thothawash || jothawash || shothawash || kothawash
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || thawash || thawash || thawash || thawash
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || thawash || thawash || thawash || thawash
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || thawash || thawash || thawash || thawash
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || thawash || thawash || thawash || thawash
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæthawash || jæthawash || shæthawash || kæthawash
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathathawash || jajathawash || shashathawash || kakathawash
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thathawash || jathawash || shathawash || kathawash
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thathawash || jathawash || shathawash || kathawash
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shathawash
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshathawash
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishathawash
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shathawashnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshathawashnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishathawashnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shathawashshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshathawashnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishathawashshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shathawashro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshathawashnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishathawashro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shathawashmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshathawashnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishathawashmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shathawashsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshathawashnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishathawashsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shathawashng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshathawashnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishathawashng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shathawashya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshathawashnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishathawashya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shathawashyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshathawashnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishathawashyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shathawashnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshathawashnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishathawashnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shathawashnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshathawashnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishathawashnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shathawashnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshathawashnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishathawashnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shathawashshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshathawashnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishathawashshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shathawashshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshathawashnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishathawashshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shathawashshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshathawashnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishathawashshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shathawashronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshathawashnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishathawashronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shathawashroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshathawashnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishathawashroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shathawashromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshathawashnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishathawashromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shathawashmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshathawashnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishathawashmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shathawashmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshathawashnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishathawashmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shathawashmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshathawashnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishathawashmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
